decisionNotes.8-11: Deviation D-001: replace terminal menu and PF-key behavior with accessible Angular navigation.
decisionNotes.12-14: Deviation D-001: one target navigation/domain model with channel-neutral customer IDs; no CICS/IMS selector or identifier prefix.
decisionNotes.15-20: Deviation D-002: secure Identity sessions and reliable logout replace IMS session quirks.
decisionNotes.31-32: Decision D-010: preserve credit assessment through a port; demo provider is explicitly simulated.
decisionNotes.39: Decision D-009: implement authorized customer retirement instead of the unsupported web placeholder.
decisionNotes.46: Deviation D-011: dormant old-account logic is not ported.
decisionNotes.54: Decision D-016: statement dates are system-managed and not editable account metadata.
decisionNotes.57: Decision D-017: eligibility-gated closure with retained history replaces unconditional hard delete.
decisionNotes.53,56,58: Decision D-009: implement supported account lifecycle UI/API instead of Feature Not Implemented.
decisionNotes.67: Deviation D-003: reject customer/account ownership mismatch.
decisionNotes.68: Deviation D-006: make balance, history, and audit persistence atomic.
decisionNotes.69: Deviation D-011: display the returned balance instead of legacy N/A.
decisionNotes.72-78: Deviation D-004/D-005: one positive-amount, ownership, product, and sufficient-funds rule set.
decisionNotes.84: Deviation D-004: enforce available-funds/overdraft policy before transfer.
decisionNotes.85: Deviation D-011: non-deployed bank-to-bank surface is not ported.
decisionNotes.91: Deviation D-008: unbound all-account route is not recreated without a target business use case.
decisionNotes.92-93: Decision D-008: provide supported unified history resources, not missing legacy mappings.
decisionNotes.95-96: Deviation D-008: target Problem Details replace missing generated response files.
decisionNotes.100-107: Decision D-012: preserve statement behavior through an explicit modern job/API without JCL or fixed-width pagination.
decisionNotes.109: Deviation D-002: placeholder OAuth endpoints are not advertised; target uses secure same-origin sessions.
decisionNotes.110-112: Deviation D-007: normalize all legacy account types to one target enum.
decisionNotes.113-117: Deviation D-001/D-002/D-014: secure same-origin Angular/API shell replaces the unauthenticated proxy panel.
decisionNotes.119-126: Deviation D-013: explicit EF migrations and import/demo command replace IBM loaders and DB2 preparation.
decisionNotes.128-153: Deviation D-014/D-015: Docker Compose and secure modern operations replace IBM-only tooling; IBM runtime remains unverified.
